title: Cache-aside without stampede protection — hot key miss causes DB overload
expected_feedback: Standard: When the hot product key expires, all 5000 concurrent requests miss the cache simultaneously and query the database — a cache stampede (thundering herd). At 5K QPS, this can exhaust DB connection pools and cause cascading timeouts. Use singleflight (golang.org/x/sync/singleflight) to ensure only one goroutine fetches from DB while others wait for the result. Alternative: stale-while-revalidate pattern or probabilistic early expiration.
